Events & Answers.

01 — Calendar

Upcoming Events

From build open-days to track experiences, the syndicate calendar is designed to maximise your connection to the car and the community.

October 2026
Members Only

Build Facility Open Day

Exclusive behind-the-scenes access for confirmed syndicate members. See the chassis in progress, meet the fabrication team, and review panel fitment firsthand.

Silverstone Park, UK
View Details →
July 2027
Public + Members

Goodwood Members' Meeting

Syndicate will have a dedicated paddock presence. Syndicate members receive hospitality passes and grid walk access.

Goodwood Circuit, UK
View Details →
SEP 2026
Members Only

Design Review Weekend

Final design sign-off event. Members vote on remaining specification choices: wheel finish, interior stitch colour, and livery details.

Silverstone Park, UK
View Details →
Nov 2027
Members Only

Track Day Silverstone Anglesey Circuit

First shakedown and member track experience. Professional instruction provided. Photography and videography included.

Silverstone, UK
View Details →

Common Questions

Still Have Questions?

We are happy to talk through anything that is not covered above. No obligation, no pressure.
